Man, this hits the spot. So savoury and comforting.
A hot, rich, and comforting traditional Korean stew made with fermented soybean paste (Doenjang).

advancement.korean_food.sikhye.desc: A sweet, refreshing, and traditional Korean beverage made from malt barley and fermented rice.

advancement.korean_food.fight_fire.title: Fight Fire with Fire
advancement.korean_food.fight_fire.desc: Fight heat with hot food! Did you know Koreans eat hot food in hot weather to beat the heat?
